message:
feat(abi): add 26 Tier 10 symbols (namespace, mount, fanotify, process_vm, LFS64)

RawSyscall: setns, unshare, mount, umount2, chroot, pivot_root, acct,
reboot, swapon, swapoff, getresuid, getresgid, setresuid, setresgid,
fanotify_init, fanotify_mark, process_vm_readv, process_vm_writev,
mlock2, name_to_handle_at, open_by_handle_at

GlibcCallThrough: umount, glob64, globfree64, nftw64, alphasort64

Total: 929 symbols (394 Impl, 234 Raw, 301 GCT)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

     "RawSyscall": "ABI entrypoint marshals arguments directly to Linux syscall instruction. No glibc call-through.",
